title: 15 Minutes of Horror: IRS Officer's Daughter Unconscious While Sexually Assaulted, Accused Remorseless; Police Seek Custody
description: Delhi Police have sought four days of custodial interrogation of accused Rahul Meena in connection with the alleged rape and murder of an IRS officer’s daughter in South Delhi’s Kailash Hills. Investigators aim to reconstruct events, verify forensic evidence, and establish motive as the case unfolds.
